heading: Maps and legal descriptions
label: 460nnn–1 Maps and legal descriptions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in subsec. (b), was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Steens Mountain Cooperative Management and Protection Act of 2000, which is classified generally to this subchapter. children.text: The Cooperative Management and Protection Area.
The wild and scenic river segments and redband trout reserve designated by part C.
The mineral withdrawal area designated by part D.
The wildlands juniper management area established by part E.
The land exchanges required by part F.

children.heading: Legal effect and correction
children.label: b Legal effect and correction
children.text: The maps and legal descriptions referred to in subsection (a) shall have the same force and effect as if included in this subchapter, except the Secretary may correct clerical and typographical errors in such maps and legal descriptions.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: c Public availability
children.text: Copies of the maps and legal descriptions referred to in subsection (a) shall be on file and available for public inspection in the Office of the Director of the Bureau of Land Management and in the appropriate office of the Bureau of Land Management in the State of Oregon.
